prompt: Start the tech design for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. The capability and its user experiences are already documented under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/.

assertions.text: announces Stage 1 (or clearly identifies the current stage as requirements extraction)
tech-requirements.md frontmatter contains reviewed_at: null (or equivalent unset value)
tech-requirements.md uses TR-NN identifiers starting at TR-01
every TR has a Source: link back to either the capability _index.md or a UX doc
does NOT propose ADRs in this turn
does NOT propose specific technologies, libraries, or implementation choices as requirements
tells the user about the reviewed_at gate before Stage 2 can begin
reads the capability _index.md and at least 3 of the 7 UX docs
